name: experiment-dashboard
description: Use this skill when the user wants to create, generate, or deploy a self-hosted website to display or visualize simulation or experiment results from a container platform (e.g., idmtools, emod). Triggers when the user mentions hosting results, rendering simulation outputs, building a results dashboard, or publishing experiment data from a container run. Also use when the user wants to visualize or browse output files generated by idmtools or similar platforms in a web interface. Do NOT use for general web development tasks unrelated to simulation or experiment result rendering.
